blockers.title: Admin guardian resends lose the admin actor in the audit trail
blockers.evidence: convex/guardians.ts:421 gates resendGuardianEmailFromPanel with requireSuperAdminInAction, but discards the returned admin email. The actual state-changing send/token rotation is audited in prepareGuardianSend at convex/guardians.ts:254 as actor=member.email, role="system", source="system". It will not appear in listAdminAuditLog, which filters source="admin_fallback" at convex/admin/audit.ts:35.
blockers.required_fix: Record an admin_fallback audit row for admin-triggered guardian resends/refusals with the authenticated admin as actor, while keeping guardian PII out of summaries. Ensure the admin audit view shows it.

blockers.title: Admin authorization does not require a signed-in member row
blockers.evidence: Spec criterion 1 says requireSuperAdmin compares the signed-in member email. convex/lib/adminAuth.ts:46-55 reads only the Convex auth users row, and convex/lib/adminAuth.ts:63-71 authorizes any authenticated user whose auth email is in SUPER_ADMIN_EMAILS. No members lookup is required.
blockers.required_fix: Resolve the caller through the members table, deny if no linked member exists, and use that member email for the allowlist/audit actor. Add the missing non-member allowlisted-user denial test.

blockers.title: Conflict archive action is broader than the vault decision and can permanently park a valid single conflict
blockers.evidence: The vault/spec decided archiveConflictRow for the non-matching row of a duplicate-email pair. convex/admin/claims.ts:233-242 only checks claim_state === "conflict" before moving a row to archived_conflict. src/admin/ClaimConflictsQueue.tsx:118-204 renders the archive action for every conflict row, including single DOB-mismatch or missing-legacy-number conflicts.
blockers.required_fix: Only allow/archive rows that are part of the resolved duplicate-email pair, and hide/refuse archive for single ambiguous conflicts. Keep other conflict types in review until corrected/released or otherwise explicitly specified by the vault.

non_blocking_notes: npx tsc --noEmit passed. Vitest could not start in this read-only review sandbox because Vite tried to write node_modules/.vite-temp.
No secrets were found in the diff; .env.example adds only variable names/placeholders.

spec_compliance.evidence: Every admin query/mutation is gated, but requireSuperAdmin authorizes from the auth user email only, not a signed-in member row.
Resolve path preserves matchClaim safeguards, but archiveConflictRow is not limited to the duplicate-pair archive case required by the spec.
Panel wrapper uses shared applyPipelineDecision, admin identity as reviewer, and approval enforces standard lane, active state, and latest true consent.
No confirm path exists and resend reuses the send path, but admin-triggered resend is not audited as an admin_fallback action with the admin actor.
submitMyDataRequest takes subject email from auth, public submitDataRequest is Turnstile/rate-limited and creates only an inert record.
The queue lists submitted/identity_pending rows and approveDataRequest records approved/rejected with verification_method; fulfil/export execution is intentionally deferred by the spec resolution.
All admin writes in the React panel use ConfirmAction with a second explicit click and inline result state.
Audit view exists for source=admin_fallback, but guardian resends initiated from the panel are logged as system/source=system and are invisible there.
No em dashes or gold accents were introduced in the diffed member/admin-facing strings found by search.

spec_compliance.criterion: 10. No bulk export, no enumeration, neutral errors
spec_compliance.evidence: No bulk data export or general member search is added; admin queues list review-state rows only, and public data request submission does not reveal whether the subject exists.
Tests cover many paths, but miss the allowlisted auth user with no member row. Vitest could not be run in this read-only sandbox.
No Contributor/Safeguarding Deputy views, certificate admin UI, event admin, broadcast UI, or member directory/search were added.

summary: The slice is close, but it cannot ship with an unattributed admin resend path, an auth helper that skips the member-row requirement, and an overbroad conflict archive action that can make a valid claimant permanently unclaimable.
